item.author: phatsss

item.title: 使用 Node.js 和 Express 设置 TypeScript | Set up TypeScript with Node.js and Express
item.description:
帕阮

发表于 4 月 24 日

  • 节点.js
  • 支持 MacOS、Windows 和 Linux

首先创建一个名为 myapp 的文件夹（您可以根据您的项目命名）。

导航到新创建的文件夹并运行命令npm init --yes以创建package.json文件。

 $ mkdir myapp $ cd myapp $ npm init --yes

使用--yes标志，您将为 npm 选择默认配置。 这是运行命令后的 package.json 文件：

 // package.json { { "name": "myapp", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "", "main": "index.js", "scripts": { "test": "echo \"Error: no test specified\" && exit 1" }, "keywords": [], "author": "", "license": "ISC" }

接下来，我们将使用以下安装命令安装 Express 和 TypeScript：

 $ npm install -s express $ npm install -D typescript @types/express @types/node ts-node-dev

使用-s或--save ，库将在package.json文件的依赖项部分中注明。 同样，使用-D或--save-dev ，库将在 devDependencies 部分中注明。

之后，我们需要运行命令为项目配置 TypeScript：

这将在您的项目目录中创建一个tsconfig.json文件，其中包含以下内容：

 { "compilerOptions": { "target": "es6", "module": "commonjs", "outDir": "dist", "rootDir": "./", "strict": true, "esModuleInterop": true, "skipLibCheck": true } }

接下来，我们创建一个src文件夹来包含我们的代码，并创建一个app.ts文件来为我们的代码设置服务器：

 // src/app.ts import express, { Application, Request, Response } from "express"; class App() { private readonly app: Application; private readonly port: string | number; constructor() { this.app = express(); this.port = process.env.PORT || 8080; this.setup(); } public async setup() { this.app.use(express.json()); this.app.use(express.static("public")); } public start() { this.app.listen(this.port, () => { console.log(`⚡️[server]: Server is running at http://localhost:${this.port}`); }) } }

接下来，我们将通过创建一个controllers文件夹，然后创建一个controller.ts文件来创建一个 Controller。

 // src/controllers/controller.ts import express from "express"; interface Controller { setupRoutes(app: express.Application): void; } export default Controller
 // src/controllers/hello.controller.ts import { Application, Router, Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express"; import Controller from "./controller"; export class HelloController implements Controller { private readonly router: Router; private readonly path: string; constructor(app: Application) { this.path = '/'; this.router = Router(); this.setupRoutes(app); } public hello = async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => { return res.send("Hello world!!!"); } setupRoutes(app: Application): void { this.router.get(`${this.path}`, this.hello); app.use('/', this.router); } } export default HelloController;

将控制器添加到app.ts文件

// src/app.ts public async setup() { //... await this.setupController(); } public async setupController() { new HelloController(this.app); }

以下是app.ts文件的完整内容：

 import express, { Application, Request, Response } from "express"; import HelloController from "./controllers/hello.controller"; class App { private readonly app: Application; private readonly port: string | number; constructor() { this.app = express(); this.port = process.env.PORT || 8080; this.setup(); } public async setup() { this.app.use(express.json()); this.app.use(express.static("public")); await this.setupController(); } public async setupController() { new HelloController(this.app); } public start() { this.app.listen(this.port, () => { console.log(`⚡️[server]: Server is running at http://localhost:${this.port}`); }) } } export default App;

接下来，我们将在src文件夹外创建一个index.ts文件来启动应用程序：

 import App from './src/app'; const app: App = new App(); app.start();

最后，我们需要更新package.json文件：

 "start": "node dist/index.js", "dev": "ts-node-dev index.ts", "build": "tsc"

祝你好运！！！

一旦被暂停，nguyenphatit 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，nguyenphatit 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，nguyenphatit 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 nguyenphatit 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 nguyenphatit 的方法：

降低 nguyenphatit 发布的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 nguyenphatit 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Phat Nguyen

Posted on Apr 24

  • Node.js
  • npm
  • MacOS, Windows, and Linux are supported

Start by creating a folder called myapp (you can name it according to your project).

Navigate into the newly created folder and run the command npm init --yes to create a package.json file.

$ mkdir myapp
$ cd myapp
$ npm init --yes

With the --yes flag, you will select the default configuration for npm. This is the package.json file after running the command:

// package.json { { "name": "myapp", "version": "1.0.0", "description": "", "main": "index.js", "scripts": { "test": "echo \"Error: no test specified\" && exit 1" }, "keywords": [], "author": "", "license": "ISC"
}

Next, we will install Express and TypeScript using the following install command:

$ npm install -s express
$ npm install -D typescript @types/express @types/node ts-node-dev

With -s or --save, the libraries will be noted in the dependencies section of the package.json file. Similarly, with -D or --save-dev, the libraries will be noted in the devDependencies section.

After that, we need to run the command to configure TypeScript for the project:

This will create a tsconfig.json file in your project directory with the following content:

{ "compilerOptions": { "target": "es6", "module": "commonjs", "outDir": "dist", "rootDir": "./", "strict": true, "esModuleInterop": true, "skipLibCheck": true }
}

Next, we create a src folder to contain our code, and create an app.ts file to set up the server for our code:

// src/app.ts import express, { Application, Request, Response } from "express"; class App() { private readonly app: Application; private readonly port: string | number; constructor() { this.app = express(); this.port = process.env.PORT || 8080; this.setup(); } public async setup() { this.app.use(express.json()); this.app.use(express.static("public")); } public start() { this.app.listen(this.port, () => { console.log(`⚡️[server]: Server is running at http://localhost:${this.port}`); }) }
}

Next, we will create a Controller by creating a controllers folder, and then creating a controller.ts file.

// src/controllers/controller.ts import express from "express"; interface Controller { setupRoutes(app: express.Application): void;
} export default Controller

// src/controllers/hello.controller.ts import { Application, Router, Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import Controller from "./controller"; export class HelloController implements Controller { private readonly router: Router; private readonly path: string; constructor(app: Application) { this.path = '/'; this.router = Router(); this.setupRoutes(app); } public hello = async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => { return res.send("Hello world!!!"); } setupRoutes(app: Application): void { this.router.get(`${this.path}`, this.hello); app.use('/', this.router); } } export default HelloController;

Add Controller to app.ts file


// src/app.ts public async setup() { //... await this.setupController();
} public async setupController() { new HelloController(this.app);
}

Here is the complete content of the app.ts file:

import express, { Application, Request, Response } from "express";
import HelloController from "./controllers/hello.controller"; class App { private readonly app: Application; private readonly port: string | number; constructor() { this.app = express(); this.port = process.env.PORT || 8080; this.setup(); } public async setup() { this.app.use(express.json()); this.app.use(express.static("public")); await this.setupController(); } public async setupController() { new HelloController(this.app); } public start() { this.app.listen(this.port, () => { console.log(`⚡️[server]: Server is running at http://localhost:${this.port}`); }) }
} export default App;

Next, we will create an index.ts file outside the src folder to start the application:

import App from './src/app'; const app: App = new App();
app.start();

Finally, we need to update the package.json file:

"start": "node dist/index.js",
"dev": "ts-node-dev index.ts",
"build": "tsc"

Good luck!!!

Steve Alves-Blyt - Mar 21

Jean-Michel Fayard 🇫🇷🇩🇪🇬🇧🇪🇸🇨🇴 - Apr 17

Once suspended, nguyenphatit will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, nguyenphatit will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by nguyenphatit will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If nguyenphatit is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag nguyenphatit:

Make all posts by nguyenphatit less visible

nguyenphatit consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging nguyenphatit will restore default visibility to their posts.
item.author: nguyenphatit

item.title: 欢迎 | Welcome
item.description:
一旦被暂停，muchai248 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被解除。

解除暂停后，muchai248 将可以重新发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，muchai248 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 muchai248 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 muchai248 的方法：

降低 muchai248 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 muchai248 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Once suspended, muchai248 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, muchai248 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by muchai248 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If muchai248 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag muchai248:

Make all posts by muchai248 less visible

muchai248 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging muchai248 will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: 🎯让我们明白️” 𝐮𝐫𝐞𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐨𝐒𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐋𝐚𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡 𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬”POC | 🎯 Let’s Understand ️” 𝐂𝐫𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚 𝐒𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐀𝐖𝐒 𝐈𝐧𝐟𝐫𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐨 𝐒𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐋𝐚𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐟𝐢𝐠𝐮𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬” POC
